_meta.description: Field mapping configuration: App fields → Excel phrase library
_meta.notes: This file maps Flutter app form fields to Excel phrase library fields. Each mapping includes the Excel option to use for phrase generation.

property_type.description: Maps app property types to Excel House/Flat categories
property_type.notes: Excel only has 2 options (House/Flat), app has 11. All house-type properties map to 'House', flats/maisonettes map to 'Flat'.

construction_type.description: Maps app construction types to Excel construction categories
construction_type.notes: Excel appears to have Traditional/Modern options. Non-traditional and modern map to Modern. [AUTO-FIXED: Options updated to match Excel library]

listed_building.description: Maps listed building status to conservation area
listed_building.notes: Maps to conservation field in Excel. Need to verify Excel options. [AUTO-FIXED: Options updated to match Excel library]

weather_current.description: Maps current weather conditions to Excel weather field
weather_current.notes: Weather field uses 'Now / Before' option with template placeholders for specific conditions

weather_previous.description: Maps previous weather conditions - used in same template as weather_current
weather_previous.notes: Combined with weather_current in template: 'weather was (dry/wet) following (dry/wet) weather'

overall_opinion.description: Surveyor's overall opinion of the property
overall_opinion.notes: Direct mapping to Excel field [AUTO-FIXED: Options updated to match Excel library]

party_disclosure.notes: Maps to party_disclosures Excel field [AUTO-FIXED: Options updated to match Excel library]

roof_type.notes: Excel field may need different option. Need to verify.

wall_construction.notes: Maps to walls field Construction option

window_type.description: Type of windows in the property

heating_type.notes: Excel has separate gas_heating and electric_heating fields. May need multiple mappings. [AUTO-FIXED: Options updated to match Excel library] [AUTO-FIXED: Options updated to match Excel library]
